chunks.title: Per-Player Setup
chunks.content:
## Each Player Receives
- 1 player mat (Forest / Grassland / Wetland habitats)
- 8 action cubes (one color)
- 1 of each food token (invertebrate, seed, fish, fruit, rodent) — 5 total
- 5 bird cards
- 2 bonus cards

## Choose & Discard
- **Bonus cards:** keep 1, discard the other
- **Starting hand:** discard any combination of birds + food so total kept = **5**

| Keep Birds | Keep Food | Total |
|---|---|---|
| 5 | 0 | 5 |
| 4 | 1 | 5 |
| 3 | 2 | 5 |
| 2 | 3 | 5 |
| 1 | 4 | 5 |
| 0 | 5 | 5 |

chunks.title: Shared Table Setup
chunks.content:
## Center of Table
1. Place the **goal board** in the middle
2. Shuffle 8 end-of-round goal tiles face-down, draw **4**, place one per round slot
   - Either side up (newer printings: optional friendly/green-side setup)
3. Reveal **3 bird cards** face-up into the **bird tray**
4. Roll all **5 food dice** into the **birdfeeder** (dice tower)
5. Give the **first-player token** to the starting player

## Dice Faces (Birdfeeder)
- Invertebrate (green worm)
- Seed (tan)
- Fish (blue)
- Fruit (red/pink)
- Rodent (grey)
- Wild

chunks.title: Turn Actions Summary
chunks.content:
## Take EXACTLY ONE action — place cube on LEFTMOST EXPOSED slot in that row, then activate BROWN powers right-to-left.

| # | Action | Row | What You Do |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Play a Bird | Top | Pay food cost + egg cost (by column), place on matching habitat slot; trigger WHITE "when played" power once |
| 2 | Gain Food | Forest | Take N dice from birdfeeder (N = slot value); each die = 1 matching food token (WILD = any) |
| 3 | Lay Eggs | Grassland | Lay N eggs (N = slot value) on your birds; respect each bird's egg capacity; split freely |
| 4 | Draw Cards | Wetland | Draw N cards (N = slot value); for each, take top of deck OR one of 3 face-up tray cards; refill tray after |

### Play a Bird — Egg Cost by Column
| Column | Egg Cost |
|---|---|
| 1 (leftmost) | 0 |
| 2 | 1 |
| 3 | 1 |
| 4 | 2 |
| 5 | 2 |

- Food cost: `/` = OR, wildcard symbol = any food.
- Birdfeeder: if all remaining dice show the same face (or only 1 die left), you MAY reset & re-roll all 5 before gaining food. Auto-resets when empty.
- Wetland "+" slots: spend listed food to draw 1 extra card.
- Cube is still spent even if action has no legal effect (e.g. no playable bird).

chunks.title: Bird Power Timing & Activation Order
chunks.content:
## Power Colors — When They Trigger

| Color | Trigger | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| WHITE | When Played | Fires once, immediately on play |
| BROWN | When Activated | Fires on the row action you just took |
| PINK | Once Between Turns | Triggers on OTHER players' turns, once per round |
| YELLOW | End of Game | Scored in final scoring only |

## Activation Order for BROWN Powers

- After resolving the row's basic effect, activate BROWN powers in that row **right-to-left** (rightmost bird first).
- Only birds in the row matching the action you took activate.
- Each bird activates once per action (unless its text says otherwise).
- You choose order only among ties; otherwise strict right-to-left.

chunks.title: Bird Card Anatomy
chunks.content:
## Bird Card Anatomy

Each of the 170 bird cards shows these elements:

| Location / Element | Meaning |
|---|---|
| Upper-left food icons | Food cost to play. `/` between icons = OR (pick one). Wildcard = any food. |
| Habitat band | Forest / grassland / wetland. Many birds allow multiple habitats. |
| Egg capacity (circles) | Max eggs this bird can hold, typically 2-6. |
| Nest type icon | Bowl, cavity, ground, platform, or star/wild. |
| Wingspan (cm) | Used for predator interactions and some bonus cards. |
| Points (VP) | Base VP scored at game end. |
| Power text (colored) | Ability; color = when it triggers (see Power Timing). |

**Note:** Nest type does NOT affect laying eggs. It only matters for bonus cards and end-of-round goals. Star/wild nests count as any nest type.

chunks.title: Power Timing Colors
chunks.content:
## Power Timing Colors

The background color of a bird's power text tells you WHEN it triggers.

| Color | Trigger | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| WHITE | When Played | One-time effect, fires as you play the bird. |
| BROWN | When Activated | Fires each time you take that row's action. Resolve row **right-to-left**. |
| PINK | Once Between Turns | Triggers on an opponent's turn that matches the condition. Once per round of turns. |
| YELLOW | End of Game | Permanent scoring bonus tallied at game end. |

### Common power categories
- **Cache food** (brown): store food on the bird; 1 VP each at end; cannot be spent.
- **Tuck cards** (brown): tuck a card under the bird; 1 VP per tucked card at end.
- **Predator** (skull icon): roll/flip to hunt; on success tuck the caught card.
- **Extra egg-laying**: lay eggs beyond capacity via power.
- **Copy**: some birds copy another bird's power.

chunks.title: Food Dice Faces & Nest Types
chunks.content:
## Food Dice & Nest Types

### Birdfeeder dice (5 custom dice)

| Face | Food | Token? |
|---|---|---|
| Green worm | Invertebrate | Yes |
| Tan | Seed | Yes |
| Blue | Fish | Yes |
| Red/pink | Fruit | Yes |
| Grey | Rodent | Yes |
| Wild (1 face per die) | Any food of your choice | **No token** - die face only |

### Nest types

| Type | Bonus/Goal behavior |
|---|---|
| Bowl | Counts only as bowl |
| Cavity | Counts only as cavity |
| Ground | Counts only as ground |
| Platform | Counts only as platform |
| Star / Wild | Counts as ANY nest type for bonus cards and end-of-round goals |

Reminder: nest type is irrelevant to laying eggs - it only matters for bonuses and goals.

chunks.title: End-Game Scoring (6 Categories)
chunks.content:
## Final Scoring — Wingspan

After round 4, sum all six categories. Highest total wins.

| # | Category | VP |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Birds in play | Face-value VP printed on each card |
| 2 | Bonus cards | Per card's scoring tiers (qualifying birds) |
| 3 | End-of-round goals | Sum of all 4 placements on goal board |
| 4 | Eggs | 1 VP each (currently on bird cards) |
| 5 | Cached food | 1 VP each (stored on birds via cache powers) |
| 6 | Tucked cards | 1 VP each (tucked under birds) |

### Tiebreaker
- Most food tokens + eggs + tucked cards remaining wins.
- Some editions fall back to birds-in-play or bonus cards next — check rulebook.

chunks.title: End-of-Round Goal Board Scoring
chunks.content:
## Goal Board Placement (4x per Game)

At end of each round, rank players on the round's goal tile and place an action cube.

### Point values by tile side

| Place | Blue side | Green side |
|---|---|---|
| 1st | 5 | 6 |
| 2nd | 2 | 3 |
| 3rd | 1 | 1 |
| 4th | 0 | 0 |

### Ties
- Tied players both place on the HIGHER tied spot.
- The next spot down is SKIPPED.
- At game end, add the tied spots' values together and divide by number of tied players (round down).

### Notes
- 4th place always scores 0.
- A player with zero qualifying items can still place (and score 0 or be beaten by anyone with 1+).

chunks.title: First-Timer Tips That Change Your Turn
chunks.content:
## Tips for New Players

- **Read your bonus card FIRST** — it often dictates which habitat or bird trait to chase all game.
- **Check all 4 round goals before turn 1** — the goal board is fixed at setup, so plan your tempo around it.
- **Even a token push beats 4th place** — 4th in a round-end goal is 0 VP, so drop a single cube rather than abandon it.
- **Fill leftmost slots early** — column 1 costs 0 eggs and unlocks higher-value slots to the right.
- **Stack BROWN powers in your favorite habitat** — they retrigger every time you take that action, compounding fast.
- **Play WHITE 'when played' birds earlier, not later** — their ongoing effects need rounds left to pay off.
- **Don't hoard eggs for VP** — you need them as currency to play birds in columns 2–5; 1 VP each is a consolation, not a plan.
- **Front-load big engines before Round 4** — you only get 5 turns in the final round, so cache/tuck setups played then barely fire.

chunks.title: End-Game Decision Checks
chunks.content:
## Last-Round Decisions

- **Count your remaining turns out loud** — Round 4 is 5 turns; activating a row is often worth more than playing a new bird.
- **Trigger your best BROWN row one more time** — a full habitat row action usually beats a marginal bird play.
- **Spend leftover eggs on cheap bird plays** — an unplayed bird on your board is often more VP than an egg sitting in a nest.
- **Check the final round goal mid-round, not at the end** — a single cube placement can swing 2–3 places.
- **Prefer activating cached-food / tucking birds over feeding new ones** — those VP tokens are locked in immediately.
- **Don't draw cards on your last 1–2 turns** — face-down cards in hand score nothing.

chunks.title: Solo Automa Quick Reference
chunks.content:
## Solo Automa (1-player Variant)

Shipped with base game. Automa has no player mat, no cards, no food, no eggs — just action cubes and her own deck.

### Difficulty Ladder

| Difficulty | VP per face-down bird card |
|---|---|
| Easy | 3 |
| Medium | 4 |
| Hard | 5 |
| Expert | 5 (+ harder setup) |

### Round Structure

| Round | Your actions | Automa cards |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | 8 | 10 |
| 2 | 7 | 9 |
| 3 | 6 | 8 |
| 4 | 5 | 7 |

Automa may outpace you — this is intentional.

### Automa Action Symbols

Flip top card, resolve the symbol matching the current round.

| Symbol | Automa does |
|---|---|
| Play a Bird | Takes 1+ bird-tray cards matching her game-end goal (tiebreak leftmost/rightmost per card); places face-up or face-down in aviary. Refill tray. |
| Gain Food | Removes ALL dice from birdfeeder showing the first food in the card's priority order (denies you). |
| Lay Eggs | Gains eggs equal to value (1 VP each at game end). |
| Draw Cards | Takes 1 face-down card from deck (or sometimes face-up). |
| Goal / Pink | Places/removes a cube on current round's goal tile, or triggers a pink-power effect. |

### End-of-Round Goals

Automa's goal-tile count = cubes placed during the round ± base modifier on her Goal Reference card. Award 1st/2nd normally.

### Final Scoring (Automa)

- Face value of face-up bird cards collected
- 3 / 4 / 5 VP per face-down bird card (by difficulty)
- 1 VP per egg
- End-of-round goal points
- Points from her game-end goal card

You win if your total VP > Automa's.
